item.title: EPIC Dataset: From Microscopy to Graph Neural Networks
item.description: Complete guide to preprocessing and analyzing C. elegans embryonic development using spatio-temporal graph data

item.description: Complete guide to preprocessing and analyzing C. elegans embryonic development using spatio-temporal graph data

item.title: Attention in Development Biology?
item.description: My set of research while i build my proposal for GSOC 2026 at the Openworm Foundation
